videos.headline: Georgia's Kenny McIntosh reels in 12-yard TD catch
videos.description: Stetson Bennett finds Kenny McIntosh for a 12-yard touchdown as Georgia takes a 14-0 lead vs. UAB.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia's Kenny McIntosh reels in 12-yard TD catch) 2021/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brock Bowers goes 88 yards to the house for a Georgia TD
videos.description: Stetson Bennett throws his third touchdown of the first quarter as Brock Bowers runs in untouched for an 88-yard score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brock Bowers goes 88 yards to the house for a Georgia TD) 2021/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Stetson Bennett airs it out to Arian Smith for 61-yard TD
videos.description: Stetson Bennett tosses another deep touchdown pass for Georgia, this time finding Arian Smith wide open down field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Stetson Bennett airs it out to Arian Smith for 61-yard TD) 2021/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: James Cook breaks several tackles to get in the end zone
videos.description: UAB can't bring down James Cook, who evades multiple tackles and runs for a Georgia touchdown.

videos.headline: Georgia QB Carson Beck throws first-career TD pass
videos.description: Carson Beck finds Justin Robinson for a 12-yard touchdown pass as Georgia extends its lead over UAB to 49-0.
